His customer service was absolutely exceptional.

David went above and beyond by taking the time to come back to the property, meet with me in person, and review the home inspection paperwork. He made sure every last detail was taken care of and did so with a genuinely friendly and professional attitude. I really appreciated the extra effort he put in, it set a great example of what quality service should look like.

As someone who manages multiple buildings, I’ve worked with Interior Roofing before, and after this experience, I’ll absolutely continue to be a customer in the future. Once David became aware of my concerns, he showed initiative, followed through on everything, and made sure the final result was something I was fully satisfied with.

Please pass along my thanks to him, he did an outstanding job.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"jed maddock","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUeo64H4nvqI3-B0vx-UEItfSVHeG8zi6fTzqD32I9UDthf034Sgg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After a November windstorm and the loss of some shingles we needed a quick replacement. I’m happy that we called Interior Roofing for assistance. For starters, a real person answered the phone, what a treat. They arranged a quick inspection of the damage and arrived on time as promised.

The gentleman who arrived at our residence checked out the damaged roof. He quickly outlined my options for repair and gave me an understanding of the timeline. He was very personal and professional.

When the time came to repair the roof, he made a quick call to confirm he was on the way and then got straight to work on arrival.
He was courteous, professional, and knowledgable about the work that needed to be done. Thank you for a “Great Job” on time on budget and quality workmanship.

I’m very happy to have dealt with Interior Roofing, and I would recommend this business to others who are in need of roofing assistance,","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Janice Bromley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIemG3KeU9CZDWS3F9katWUUM1cHFNgaqBnRgRnvlb3IaOGOA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We are very happy with our new roof! They came 2months later to give us an estimate, and instead of a quote, they send us an invoice of 300 $. Supposely they fixed a patch, but nothing is fixed, and the roof still leaking.
Big ripoff, beware of them","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Joel JL Interiors Drywall & Insulation","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUldtxZ6MrOtrpuQ5Z7_N2VM7daMExMnvAZt7ECfsVjnMrlkj0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"My business partner and I are doing renovations on our new funeral home just down the street from Interior Roofing. They came to talk to us and told us they'd give us a quote for our new roof. He said he'd give us a deal since we are "friends" and neighbours. The quote seemed very high so we requested two other roofing company quotes. These were $15,000 less than the Interior Roofing quote. We decided to go with one of the lower quotes, and Interior Roofing was not happy we didn't use their services. They became aggressive and called Work Safe BC to complain about the roofing company currently working on our roof. WCB came by and everything was fine, but I would not recommend this unprofessional company to anyone else. You'll save yourself money and headaches.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nav Lasser","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUT0vVFAO8AIvTaIVPbZqvk_rXLMyj_zdlEbABikPN9-uMbY4tc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Sun City Exteriors is far superior, provide better customer service and are competitively priced.

Finally got a quote, $3,600 over market.

Giving this place 1 star is being generous.","Images":null,"When":""}]

I never imagined my home and garage could look this good! I also had some cedar siding on the lower part of both buildings that he replaced with Hardie Board siding as well as installing new facia and soffits on the garage to match the house.  He’s a very hard worker and pricing was very competitive. I recommend New Look Exteriors to anyone looking to give their home a much-needed update.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBy4DWI8IwigjsyxyyG0ohS&fid=0x0:0xde4455cb7cb688ea"],"When":"2025-9-6"},{"Name":"Kary Troyer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXso-Ze2sTY86nmmUA3dJ-La6-8keUlvd8BZYfzc2-ib9bg-f9hVg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great workmanship and value

Excellent workmanship and followed directions. Highly recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kelowna Wines and Fruit","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUWrni4YuEo1m9OhkshYMQP---gm0R5ZfNPvxMyqMyyNN0D9Bfu=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"What a terrible experience!
The cleaning job was done horribly and they basically held me ransom for a $2000 fee! That's 4 times anybody else's fee. Then they wanted an additional $200!!! What a scam!
The work was substandard and the new tenant complained about the terrible job.
Normally for a move out it's only $500 but because they didn't take the reservation properly, I couldn't get anybody else last minute. I'm now getting sued by the new owner of the house I sold.
Do NOT ever deal with these scam artists.
What a nightmare

UPDATE
They went back & actually finished the job after I had to send repeated complaints.
The final work was satisfactory but Jas (the owner) refuses to take ownership of a terrible experience provided. The stress that myself & my poor little 83 year old mother had to endure was unacceptable!
She constantly argued with me, talked garbage behind my back to the buyer of my house and her team were lazy and missed multiple things.
The cleaning took more than 4 days to complete and after all this drama I was quoted by multiple other companies less than half the amount these shisters extorted from me. The other companies all said it would've been done in one day too!
$2000 is ludicrous for a move out. Even with carpets.
I do NOT recommend this company as they won't admit or appologize to providing a terrible customer experience, they charge ridiculous amounts of money & can't even take a simple reservation.
This has been an absolute nightmare.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Don fenske","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIm9sr4Uv-n5CUd5yYPtcZ9LhhsIggSEcLw4TkYhbwFuG5KSg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Score: 10
Comment: Bob Brown and his entire team were excellent. They were professional and polite and were a pleasure to work with. Bob walked us through the entire process and answered all questions and addressed any concerns we had. Special mention to Trevor who looked after every detail on the reassemble of our home. The flooring installers from Underfoot Flooring were also excellent and guided us through the whole process of selection and recommendations on the flooring we installed. Thanks to all! Sincerely Don and Tammy Fenske","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"heARTiculated kerry macLeod","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWStc9qPApnpOg2szzdh0NZLBq_bEjbpQEingHuiz9_axhzacya=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I started with this company last Feb, for a water issue in a basement bathroom, it is still not done!  I have a huge amount of photos of the disrespect for my items and home and they don't answer the flooring company etc and it's been weeks to move ahead and get my son's bedroom livable again.  The crews just came from Kelowna once again and did not do whI at they were scheduled to do as the manager pulled them to another job with excuses.  I have dealt with many restoration companies and not have had such a shitshow of an experience.  The project manager James is excellent and thorough with everything but he is pulled in so many directions it is impossible for him to keep up.  I have also caught them twice doubling the amounts of quotes for extra work I asked for from their contractors.  20 percents is standard, doubling is fraudulent.  I was told extra plumbing was 14k  and to send 7 k to them.  The same plumber came yesterday and did all that work form me plus some for under 7K!  I am a project manager and have all the insurance numbers to see as well and they have been paid for a lot that was never done.   I don't normally EVER give bad reviews but I want to save others from this nightmare until they get staffing improved.  I am happy to remove or amend this review if things actually get finished as they were paid by my insurance company.   Sharing a small selection of the photos on how they packed up and stored my personal belongings for demo.  That is the cat litter mat and box on my new leather sleeper sofa.  Insurance paid quite a lot to them to pack contents before work.  My sons new bedding was thrown in container loose and pillows.  Dirty shower pan that had septic waste under it on my sons bedside Crate & Barrel wood bedside table with new mattress and huge scratch.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCAiuqJRA&fid=0x0:0xd5036a7cb7db9ab0"],"When":"2025-1-30"},{"Name":"Jeremy Robinson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIyCFLdCalDWO5mffICYZEVgDmzhpwiDT7FeUYXajFYf3TTQQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Had one thier inspectors come and look at my 5th wheel for some rodent damage clean up. Bob says yes I can come have a look. We set a time, he shows up an spends all 20 mins there, doesn't even look under the trailer. He leaves and I get a quote the next day for more than 3x the amount of other companies that looked(actually looked).
So then when I tell him we will be going with another company he says ok I will just send you a $250 bill for the inspection. No mention at all about inspection fees b4 arrival or in any communications. Very frustrating. No transparency. Not good business practice. I would never agreed to a 250 fee for a 20 min inspection.

Edit: I spoke with the owner who agreed that it was handled incorrectly. He was very professional and agreed to waive the fee.

title: Affordable Rain Flow
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Nadine Elmer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJYEO__rccSI3IU1gEAa117Oq6zzZzVCgrSqWaF2gSPfvUFnA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My husband and I decided to take on a huge renovation project, our home!! Went to Vernon Home Show, met a very nice gentleman, Mike from Affordable Rain Flow. Mike was so personable, listen to every word I said. Little did we know it was a one shop deal!! Our home was built in 1990 by my husband and we wanted to do everything to the exterior. Mike came out to our home did some measurements and also an arial measurement, so cool never knew you could do that! After talking for a few days we came up with a plan. Next thing we had guys taking our roof off and replacing with a new roof, that even enclosed our front entrance of the roof line so we would not get rained on. They did all the soffits and gutters and then came the siding! But we first had to get our driveway done. I always wanted a White House. So once the driveway was done, now for our new LP Lap Siding in WHITE!! It was a lot of work for Mike"s crew members. Everyone was so friendly, professional, always checking in with us to make sure we were happy, so the communication was fantastic. We got to know everyone real good. We are so happy with the finished project as you can see by the pictures!! I joke and tell everyone I live at the Oyama Estate. I would highly recommend Affordable Rain Flow for everything. They did a fantastic job, already had a realtor asking if we want to sell, NO WAY! THANKS SO MUCH TO MIKE AND ALL OF  HIS CREW THEY WENT ABOVE AND BEYOND!!

MAC & NADINE ELMER
OYAMA  BC","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCw99TT3QE&fid=0x0:0xaeb4e4bfd75babc9"],"When":"2025-3-21"},{"Name":"Jonathan Bell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL0PHx-KyeE9933cGNrUuZeIEzStj-iIzZiI7rZwGWJaoT1Fg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We needed a cedar conversion to GAF 50 year. And they cleaned up the yard when they were done.
Great job Mike, Chad, Robin, and Trent","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDqlozcxAE&fid=0x0:0xaeb4e4bfd75babc9"],"When":"2021-7-7"},{"Name":"Sherry Heron","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ3FLKpOVTEZig-RTe8jX3Pz71PCTHvcW4i-Xgi0tJ8Fvt2FA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The work they did was A+.  We have a very steep pitch and was very happy they were fearless.  Thank you to Mike and Chad.  Really good guys. Our roof looks great!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mark McMahon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKumN6v3DkIW6m2nK870NUJ4ltSPL0XLkg0xFZwdZkoCblD5Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"please research and evaluate this company diligently..for your own protection...if you are a senior and have no intent to climb a ladder..??...have a professional roof inspector review the finished job at rain flows expense...i am building a 10,000 sq ft building and they butchered my roof...documented and undeniable...they promised to return and refund me the $15,000. plus cost..then no return calls...it has gone from bad to pathetically unprofessional..i am attaching a few select photo's...after being told one or two nails showing would be acceptable i told myself i could live with ten...the fact is there were over 250 nails showing..unbelievable...skylights not sealed to spec...vents not sealed to spec..an utter absolute gong show...5 months later..??...no refund...no return calls...try calling the owner..terry fleming...see if you get a call back..feel free to contact me..","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDy0tj-HA&fid=0x0:0xaeb4e4bfd75babc9"],"When":"2021-3-2"},{"Name":"Sheila Taylor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJkSbi_ZTQRBpURTVT8e7woFLn0o5x1TP8xBdk-9oBatJgSaQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Mike from Affordable Rain Flow responded in a very timely way when i reached out to several Roofing companies to get a quote to replace my
roof.
He listened to what my concerns were and proceeded to give me a competitive quote.
They were able to start within a couple days.
They vented my roof as well as replaced the stacks.
The quote he gave me was exactly as he said.
I am very pleased with their work and the finished product!
I may be old fashioned, but i really appreciated him coming out to talk to me first, instead of just sending it via email.
THANKS MIKE AND CREW!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jim Wilson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJtiR0ZN5MiA5bUVAGdG0ZmuTAE_SsBB1BtHan8s-WwJjgUgA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Being a first experience of having a roof replaced on our home we did not know what to expect, We have ro say thar we are quite satisfied with the finished roof provided and installed by the management and crew of Affordable Rain Flow. They were easy to work with and responded well to our questions and requests,","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ryan Becker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIFvPvpzqUiwc3_DurZ1HHBfR3AN1cX722G0WE58rthXx8ryA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I bought a house knowing the roof would have to be shingled soon after the purchase. So I started my search, and found affordable rain flow. Agreeing to give them our business, they arrived a few weeks later and placed a large garbage bin in the drive way for ease of discarding old material, which was great to not have nails everywhere. However at the end of the project I noticed my eaves-trough was severely damaged from the materials hitting it as they threw the old material off into the bin. I called and mentioned it to the owner, he said they would replace that portion as he wanted to make things right. About a month later we called again to get a guy here as nothing seemed to be happening. Finally we received a phone call saying a employee was sent and the issue has been corrected. As we got home we realized the employee has taken a hammer to it and tried to straighten it back out as best as he could. It looks absolutely horrible. I should also note that the eaves-trough around the perimeter of the house was filled with nails, old shingles, and pieces of wood. I had to get up there myself to clean them as this company apparently takes no pride in their workmanship. If you're looking to complete a roofing project I would highly recommend looking at another company.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"David Bickell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI-SjGsnh9-Cya0bgTrac9ykxuALXf_q5siH5yacxYhQ3kq0w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you need your roof done and want it done in a timely manner at good value, this is the company you want doing the job. The initial meeting was quick and painless with a thorough explanation of the work to be done and all costs upfront, very fair. We were given a 3-4 week estimate for job starting and they were right on time with the dump bin and crew showing up as promised. The crew that worked our house was quick, polite around our inquisitive 9yr old daughter and very clean. The driveway was swept with magnetic broom every end of day and the front and back yards tarped to catch any falling materials. Highly recommend them.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Sam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX8uVk8hc_9Oa_UqO4w2Km9pECIGIZOify8ac8wYuleL7fidbOO=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"On recycling day they don’t show up until 2 in the afternoon. On garbage day they show up at 7am. Now we are stuck with our trash for a MONTH because trash is only picked up once every 2 weeks in Summerland. The lady I politely spoke to on the phone today was so enthusiastically happy to tell me it was my fault and that the truck was not coming back. She literally sounded “happy”. I’ve read other reviews where they came back to pick up late trash, but they seem to pick and choose at receptionist’s sole discretion. There is no consistency in their schedule whatsoever. In 2007, weekly garbage pickup in Summerland was an optional service and was done by a smaller contractor. Now you are forced to pay and participate in municipal garbage collection thats costs more and provides LESS.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chelene Bogan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWKmtZBzh9Rf_zCdwgFQlplRzhvymwyE_EBqdr-Nsts5Nw1L34LJw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"These guys are super strict the demand that you have your stuff out by 7:00am  now if you don't get up by 7:00 and you happen to miss your garbage truck because your garbage truck comes on a regular schedule and one day decides to change. You're now screwed. I don't know why the city still uses this company as they cause a lot of headache, frustration. We should go back to being able to have garbage. People actually do their job. The 1 m distance between each can is ridiculous because some streets don't have that. They don't even have a sidewalk.  And when you call because they have missed it. They tell you too bad. So sad","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kathy chrystal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUkM1PV-euvWA9mUwH-VgvIV62uL9LpISwSAmJouertpQPNFvw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Caution when calling waste connections Office staff is nothing but rude ! Do better.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"David Desrochers","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUbBh3vNX9o5s5e1WaGDf1Zr40T7oGIE692eddpfa-gOY1Irrc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Just chatted with Nicky Wastech Penticton…..easy to talk to and share information on my monthly invoices and bin replacement process.    First class.    ALLGOOD","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Wonder Boy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKOMQDS6nCBNfFOV47vmAOFB9mBd5NeAynQpwoOkxqdGCTGbg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Big shout-out to Steve this morning as we got our garbage bin out a bit late this morning (rural location) and he kindly emptied it when doing the other side of the road. Hope to see you down in Oliver again soon.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Joanna McKay","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLmk6Ewonh6wetYijSYtEivWOc9HeJ5JsBUULFVzsSQ0sybtTU=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We have been clients of Waste Connections for a number of years and the frontline staff has always been very personable and professional. She also made a point of correctly saying my first name.  (Many people assume that Julia and Julie are one in the same, but they are not. The very next day it was Dino to the rescue again to replace the cart. The service excellence is consistent and please pass along my kudos to Nicky and Dino. I'd tack on a sixth star to the review if I could!","Images":null,"When":""}]

No apology, no nothing. She just said, you wont get charge for those. Hey, we all make mistakes, its the attitude towards me when it was her mistake. I didnt even say anything. Working at costumer service, you just need a smile and good attitude. Its clearly not provided in this store","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mark Karstad","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU2AhImylJN1JSde7WN_AqPdf0Wiirj30cXug35i61ZZC9wEPHDlg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The service out of the Contract Sales department is over the top.  This is not your ordinary big box store quality of service, this is your local store, personal service quality.  Recommend highly.  We got all our windows replaced.  Very pleased with the contractors that they have on call and the personal touch that the Contract Sales Staff provide -- even to come on site to help when needed.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICq_-ONCw&fid=0x0:0x22581fd52e83247a"],"When":"2021-6-24"},{"Name":"John Grant","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJQEqUJjEaP1zrFYoxF9UGmXsdnX91171djBKQc_yUgrUqCsg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Had very little stock because they had just done inventory and didn't order so they wouldn't have to count it .the lady that helped me had zero knowledge on anything I asked..last time for me at Home Hardware .","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kevin Smith","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIKn7F33uytQJYhGkRmtF-2Oo8glyc-lxp2CZ5-FAtzg4TIHw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I had a horrible experience with a guy in the contractor department named Dan Kennedy. I didn't have the receipt but I knew that could look my company up and see the receipt. This Dan guy was brutal from the moment he came to the counter. He didn't say hi, and by the look on his face It seemed like I had interrupted something important. He inspected the nail gun and pointed out that there was a scuff on the top and very rudely said that can't take it back. I understood as I didn't see the mark. The resolution was most appreciated, especially as we live some distance from the store. Many thanks!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"jen moody","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLIVTQK2DAxOOPMDcEUspn1rLe26l6rHGVkMeJhqXYGNlTC=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were just in needing a new bathroom faucet.  Perry was so very helpful!  We appreciated his knowledge and advice regarding how to replace our broken one.  It means so much to have someone so very knowledgeable and wanting to help! He’s a great asset to your store!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lo Lo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX2KZvkahVnTkUEwHAmpXf6BiFZ2v2m439b_bLTr_WIQquE0O0-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The quality of the lumber there is SHIT yes. It's like almost comical to the point we only go there if we need a few pieces of wood and go on a search for the straightest one which will always end up being bowed... haha

On the other hand, every employee there is really nice compared to Home Hardware down the road where some of them make you feel like crap for asking them to do their job or just greeting them even lol... So we go to Rona.

Also... prices for hardware is ridiculously high. Boxes of nails and screws should not be 60 to 80 dollars in my opinion. Same box at Home Depot (which I should remind you... Rona is equally american as Home Depot- for these elbows up people who think ROna is still Canadian....) will be 25 dollars, at Rona it will be sometimes 80. Don't understand these prices for a big box store. But other than that, never disappointed. Lots of deals on paint and caulk. Really can't complain, except the aforementioned points.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Real Unimportant","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUsEHYGva8v7Oj8Y9q22ZS0o7Wuw3t07ofzwW1wB2bqszMH7Rk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Everyone at Rona Penticton was so friendly and helpful, EXCEPT CODY AT THE CUSTOMER SERVICE DESK. Twice over the course of 3 days we went in and both times Cody was overly rude and dismissive of us. The first time we stopped at the customer services desk to return an item and Cody was there on his computer completely ignoring us for a few minutes. Even though we were standing right in front of his field of view. After a minute I asked “am I in the right place?” He said “for what” (with a snarky rude tone). I said “for customer service”. He said “what do you want” (again with a rude tone). We asked if we could return a shower head and he said those are not returnable. We told him that Les and Don told us they were returnable even if they were used but he said “no they wouldn’t have said that”. So we went to the desk at the back and were served by a very nice lady and returned the shower head no problem. She was confused about what Cody said, and his behaviour. The second time was a day or two later, and we again approached Cody at the customer service desk about questions we had on an item, and again he was very rude and dismissive saying “I don’t know” and then walking away from us. We are very polite people and were shocked at his level of non-customer service skills. Everyone else at Rona was very helpful and friendly, but Cody ruined the experience. We just bought our first house and wanted Rona to be our store for repairs, etc. but we will not be dealing with Cody anymore. He should not be in a customer service position.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Raya Boyd","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUulcxwazXkrObkFoyqiKsHNNigMgeRlpCSzd4J8wzf68VOWF9i=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very friendly helpful staff. They went the extra mile for me when I went to pick up osb 4x8 boards on my own (5'3" small female). They made it comfortable and easy for me to accomplish this task. Will shop there again for sure.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sharon Lawrence","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUyC70akAT5_oKnyunrfqeYgdn4mwdTvUZ3B-mDWCd-WatnWK56=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Love the craft days they have for kids here.

The lady working was very accommodating to my questions about getting a new burner for a smoker, did an amazing job with the help.  Also all other staff that I've asked for help have been very helpful.  Good place for many different things from lumber to plants for the garden!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID-r9fexQE&fid=0x0:0x51388ae8b6e54c75"],"When":"2022-12-13"},{"Name":"Gerry T","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ74-Uk9hrCRkhZ8RbdK8yZnil-RCvS2_N4q07fpM2i-hfNGQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I went to buy a water heater . user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Sandra Mendes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI-Y4lzyTscFSfzabQJit6Rq6lC67D6rxLwurt1u4H3MRplgA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pinnacle Roofing recently replaced the asphalt shingles on my roof along with 2 skylights, gutters, downspouts and fascia. I couldn’t be happier with their service. From the first quote to the finished work, each member of the team was easy to communicate with and very professional. The work was only considered done when I was completely satisfied. My property was left super clean. I highly recommend Pinnacle for the quality of their work and professionalism of their team, including the office staff. There were no surprises and they  charged exactly as they quoted. So glad I chose Pinnacle!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAZOH7nJ1tWpTgqGCNd6oFY&fid=0x0:0x4877392f1caed50a"],"When":"2025-11-19"},{"Name":"Paul LaGrange","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJj3n2u2cBa9KVPNbgQlep25YH0e_3PI-07ZPVmhtcG5ZGrmQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We hired Pinnacle Roofing to reshingle our home this fall.  They had done our original roof when we built our house in 2005, and have provided outstanding service since then.  We had some occasional storm damage, and they were quick to respond and repair, even 15 years after the original work.
Pinnacle provided us with a clear quote, with details about options that were available.  When we chose to proceed, they communicated clearly about timelines and expectations.  Their crew was efficient, polite, safety-conscious, and very respectful of us and our property. They left the worksite tidy and clean every day. The work was completed on time and without any inconvenience to us.
Pinnacle did two inspections upon completion, one to ensure everything was completed to specifications and that everything was cleaned up, and a second by a manager came to ensure it was finished professionally.  We were then provided with a final bill which was clear and accurate, with no surprises.

I can not say enough good things about this company!  Their workmanship is top quality, their communication and business practices are excellent, and their staff were a pleasure to have at our home.  This was an absolutely outstanding experience.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sean Bickert","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLgtOp2VouBfv_UmT_qB1HOvFDgkPJysJ3EELc753fowCtvCA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had our roof done by Pinnacle about 15 yrs ago. They did a great job. Site was always cleaned up daily, team checked in with us, updated us and thanked us for having them redo our roof. We refer Pinnacle all the time, and recently they replaced a roof that was done incorrectly by another roofing company that customers of ours had done. The Pinnacle team was even better than when we did our roof. There were visits from the supervisor (and updates + conversations with a roofing inspector to navigate some tricky sections for the best options for longevity) and their own internal safety officer was out to insure the team was working safely.
You cannot go wrong having Pinnacle complete your roof. Clean, courteous, prompt, and genuinely invested in do a great job that you’ll be happy with.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"That Farm","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX7RrplvxlVpRHHHMdryDxCohtY7WEYl4ukzsaOqzd8YH_NxFQ3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a leak from moss growth between shingles.   Pinnacle came out and correctly identified problem area, work was conducted to remove moss and replace shingles.    Admin team was perfect and the roofing team sent out were honest and very skilled.    They fixed leak and found another problem area that needed some sealing done.    Great group of people.    Would highly recommend to anyone who needs roof work or a new roof.    Get a quote from this company and go with the quality workmanship they offer.   We look forward to working with Pinnacle again!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ian Chapman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLgZlvvSgOL9cXDLEXq7lACZ7igmW-23E3ASXVoAXKW2bFDCQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pinnacle were absolutely wonderful to work with!
They worked with us ensuring we met the Heritage Building requirements.
From the quotes thru to completion of the project it was handled professionally.
I would highly recommend Pinnicle Roofing for anyone requiring a roof replacement.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jodi Heer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXxhN_H09OEfyA1NeXUtP8UOUYe66dylcZ3uohYRCweWPMnt4kTkQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Following the Neighbourhood wave of the "New Roof" season, We received 3 quotes from 3 different roofing companies we obviously decided to go with Pinnacle roofing. This process has been seamless and QUICK! We appreciate the quick responses from the initial inquiries, to the prompt start date. Customer service is KEY, the crew on site have been a pleasure , Simran has been very friendly and engaging. I appreciated the extensive daily clean up around the perimeter of our house, having two dogs that was a concern. I would highly recommend anyone to use Pinnacle roofing for their new roof when the time comes.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCo4cyGigE&fid=0x0:0x4877392f1caed50a"],"When":"2025-4-17"},{"Name":"Jon Derksen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWrz9HDie1Lvyv--88NusOvGDeRS2PVjpciNrAMBC8YL0Fi5kw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pinnacle installed the asphalt roof on our carriage house, which has lasted very well, and this time re-roofed our main house, adding one section of metal roofing to match the metal panelling on the carriage home.  From assessment to finished job, Pinnacle was professional and communicated well.  Better yet, they were diligent about cleaning up all the residual nails and refuse around the structure.  We really appreciate they work they did to upgrade our home.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Scott Hurry","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLnSSv_EuEpBKJt-yY7Aykv5wuWdM0OEDz6OHwKHyf2AV9P6A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pinnacle roofing gets a 10 out of 5 stars from me! This company was Beyond professional from the first phone call for an estimate to the completed replacement of an old asphalt roof and eaves troughs.
From the receptionist in the office to every single person we had an interaction with ( there was many and sorry I don’t remember all their names) they went above and beyond. I had many questions and the staff had all the answers. Everyone we talked to were friendly and went out of their way to answer any questions and describe the process from estimating to scheduling the roof replacement. The two site Forman I interacted with were  just as professional, there was one for the roof and one for the eaves troughs. They did an amazing job and left the yard clean when finished.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Claudia Orellana","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX2K-CWSlJrqaw8vOBmI9lDr5EqHthK_fAeF8anmCSkJKxXIj7A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This week was our second time shopping here this year. First it was a queen size bed. Never have I slept so comfortably. It was delivered quickly and set up even faster and professionally.

The second experience, purchasing a sectional sofa, was just as good as the first time. Friendly, non-pushy salesmanship. Mandy was great to deal with and thankfully did a great job at not being annoyed at my sweetheart’s constant jokes. Ha ha. Took advantage of the 3 month financing plan that comes with $0 interest. How great is that? Great sales going on now, so I’m sure I’ll be back for more furniture after I move next week.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA8nT4wxRunlxtBmLa6RQPl&fid=0x0:0x6fb6361d8788a057"],"When":"2025-7-20"},{"Name":"Donald Mundrick","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocINXOyT8b9h1U9dvOyKqfPBmLaJvUbUgkfCUcZJl5JFpSq9bX4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We recently purchased a loveseat from Hometown Furniture and would like to share our experience.  The store is easy to access with loads of parking.  They carry a wide variety of quality furniture at very competitive prices.  They are also a locally owned family business.

When we first walked in the store, we were greeted by Gurpreet.  She politely asked if we needed assistance.  Not pushy, just friendly.  We told her what we were looking for, and she asked very pertinent questions about our needs.  She noted that I am quite a bit taller than my wife, so I would need a larger item.  She took us over to a Palliser unit, plugged it in and asked me to sit down.  I was in heaven!  The chair was so comfortable.  Then my wife tried it and agreed.  Gurpreet asked if we wanted financing, and explained the various options open to us.  The whole process took very little time, and we were very pleased.

Delivery was well within the timelines we expected.  The delivery driver and helper were very efficient and friendly, taking great care to not scratch door frames or walls.  They installed the loveseat, plugged it in and made sure to test it.

Overall, our experience was VERY positive.  We would recommend Hometown (and definitely Gurpreet) if you are shopping for quality furniture!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lawrie Shears","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL4I08noeF-Y20SEEKqQ6AA2wwL7st0Qq2hSL-8d5P1u6hP_A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Went to "browze" the Furniture at the store as it was our first time there. We never knew there was a second floor as well with a great selection of furniture. We met Jordan and he was great to point out the features and benefits of the different models. We bought a Sectional and a Lazy Boy chair and will go back to get our other furniture needs. They offer delivery and pick up of your old furniture. We highly recommend shopping there first! Thanks Jordan!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"jennifer bjorkman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLsdZAAdWCCpZFRWmWPW4PaEMmqKNfYSzv-Gsv14KXIxd9n72I=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Everything about this purchase and delivery went exceptionally well. My freezer died and left me with a huge nasty mess and no deep freeze. From Killy in sales to the delivery team, I was treated very well and Im very happy with my purchase. They had me set up again inside 3 days. The prices were fair for good products.
Id highly recommend them for any appliance needs.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Johanna Clark","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXyOuObzNdQdL5cxzTmZPz1Q2yC1FHJ3TJ0eQnuy0aonwkmGrqU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have to say kudos to Hometown Furniture for their service and going the extra mile in making sure my appliance purchase was to my satisfaction after a getting a faulty machine. I remain a loyal customer. Thank you!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tom Lowe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKSH1bV-rcffVuizjOAhLhYPfbkn9BR4bIczu8XIVpAoMNc3g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Just finished wrapping up a purchase for a new couch, table and 2 chairs for our living room .
I've got to say that our experience working with Mandy was one of the best buying experiences ever
She really knows her stuff and was never pushy. We ended up with beautiful living room furniture that we will truly enjoy.
Thank you so much Mandy","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rolly St.Amand","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIO_i7-LnNXPwIuYVHmfdykW8kzRgI9IBgmSYzcgjYF9f0-AQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Found an occasional chair that my wife and I liked but in the wrong colour, so Mandy was quick to point out that we could order the chair in the colour of our choice. She sat with us and showed us the fabric and colours we could get, so we ordered two! She mentioned it would take about 2 to 3 weeks. They were delivered the other day (2 weeks and 2 days!) and the guys brought them into the house for us. We've also bought appliances from Hometown before and we're really happy with the service we've received. They're great to deal with. And the best thing about our purchase is they made right in Delta B.C.
Buy Canadian!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Wayne Watson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIkYX517t8zALW9DnvJglOh1kyaXjQn-OFiNOtwzGSAcaZBvg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very pleased again, at Hometown. My wife and I were able to get everything we wanted in a most convenient and comfortable environment. We had an excellent experience with all of the staff. Our sales advisor, Gurpreet was very knowledgeable, professional and just the right amount of helpful. I would encourage others to shop locally at Hometown. The trip is worth it.
Thanks for another great experience.","Images":null,"When":""}]
